title: Gemini Omni Tutorial: How to Use Gemini Omni AI for Beginners
summary: Tutorial demonstrating Google Omni Flash for AI video generation and editing workflows. Tests physics simulation, character consistency, scene memory, and compares performance against Sora (Seedance 2) on real footage editing scenarios.
writeup: A beginner-oriented tutorial from AI Master walking through Google Omni Flash for AI video generation and editing. The video tests physics simulation, character consistency, and scene memory, and it covers iterative refinement workflows for building and adjusting clips. It benchmarks Omni Flash against Sora (Seedance 2) on real footage editing scenarios, framing where each tool holds up across these tasks.
